narrative:
Nico Elvedi is a Centre-Back for Switzerland. His overall rating of 7.21/10 places him among the top 4% of centre-backs at this tournament. This rating is primarily influenced by his club form, with 78% derived from the last two seasons.

Elvedi exhibits solid defensive numbers at this World Cup, averaging 0.938 interceptions and 6.938 clearances per 90 minutes. However, his offensive output is limited, registering 0.075 expected goals and 0.017 expected assists per 90 minutes. He records only 0.188 shots and 0.375 key passes per 90 minutes.

Elvedi plays a vital role as a defensive specialist in the Swiss national team, having accumulated 480 minutes at this World Cup. Scouts and fans should watch for his continued strong defensive positioning and ability to disrupt opposition attacks. His impact will remain focused on defensive solidity rather than contributing significantly to offensive phases.
